associatedMedia.headline: Eilean Donan Castle, Donan, Isle of Skye, Scotland
associatedMedia.description:
History
The name Eilean Donan, or island of Donan, is most probably called after the 6th century Irish Saint, Bishop Donan who came to Scotland around 580 AD. There are several churches dedicated to Donan in the area and it is likely that he formed a small cell or community on the island during the late 7th century.

associatedMedia.headline: WHY IS IT THAT MY HEART STIRS WHEN I HEAR BAGPIPES?

zh.Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴
zh.Whittingehame, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾廷哈梅
zh.lifeSummary: 當Angus Crom MacKenneth於1200年出生在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾時，他的父親Kenneth MacKenneth of Kintail50歲，母親Lady Morna MacDougall35歲。他於大約1240年與Sybella Stewart在蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1278年在蘇格蘭享年78歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易納。

zh-hans.Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴
zh-hans.Whittingehame, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 苏格兰哈丁頓史爾廷哈梅
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Angus Crom MacKenneth于1200年出生在苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾时，他的父亲Kenneth MacKenneth of Kintail50岁，母亲Lady Morna MacDougall35岁。他于大约1240年与Sybella Stewart在苏格兰洛-爾金泰爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1278年在苏格兰享年78岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾易納。

nameMeanings.name: Crom
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Krom
meanings: Dutch (also De Krom): nickname for a hunchback, from Middle Dutch crom ‘crooked’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Yiddish krom ‘shop’, ‘store’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a retailer.

nameMeanings.name: Angus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Scottish Gaelic name Aonghas . Though still having a Scottish flavour, it has been used increasingly in modern times also by people without Scottish connections.

variants.name: Aonghas
meanings: Pronounced ‘een-yis’; from Celtic words meaning ‘one’ and ‘choice’. This is the name of an ancient Celtic god, and is first recorded as a personal name in Adomnan's ‘Life of St Columba’, where it occurs in the form Oinogus(s)ius as the name of a man for whom the saint prophesied a long life and a peaceful death. This is also almost certainly the name of the 8th-century Pictish king variously recorded as Onnust and Hungus.

en.lifeSummary: When Angus Crom MacKenneth was born in 1200, in Cromartyshire, Scotland, his father, Kenneth MacKenneth of Kintail, was 50 and his mother, Lady Morna MacDougall, was 35. He married Sybella Stewart about 1240, in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1278, in Scotland, at the age of 78, and was buried in Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Angus Crom MacKenneth est né en 1200, à Cromartyshire, Écosse, son père, Kenneth MacKenneth of Kintail, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Lady Morna MacDougall, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Sybella Stewart environ 1240, à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1278, à Écosse, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Iona, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Angus Crom MacKenneth 1200 in Cromartyshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Kenneth MacKenneth of Kintail 50 und seine Mutter Lady Morna MacDougall 35. Er hat um 1240 in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland Sybella Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1278 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Iona, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Angus Crom MacKenneth è nato il nel 1200 nel Cromartyshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Kenneth MacKenneth of Kintail, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Lady Morna MacDougall, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Sybella Stewart circa 1240, nel Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1278, nel Scotland, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Angus Crom MacKennethが1200年にスコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Kenneth MacKenneth of Kintailは50歳，母Lady Morna MacDougallは35歳であった。約1240年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアキンティイルでSybella Stewartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1278年にスコットランドで78歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルアイオナにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Angus Crom MacKenneth(이)가 1200년 스컷랜드 크로마티실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Kenneth MacKenneth of Kintail(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Morna MacDougall(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1240년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에서 Sybella Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1278년 스컷랜드에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 이오나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Angus Crom MacKenneth nasceu em 1200, em Cromartyshire, Scotland, seu pai, Kenneth MacKenneth of Kintail, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Lady Morna MacDougall, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Sybella Stewart aproximadamente 1240, em Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1278, em Scotland, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Angus Crom MacKenneth родился в 1200 г. в местности кромертишир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Kenneth MacKenneth of Kintail было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Morna MacDougall, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybella Stewart около 1240 г. в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1278 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности иона, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Angus Crom MacKenneth nació en 1200, en Cromartyshire, Scotland, su papá, Kenneth MacKenneth of Kintail, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Lady Morna MacDougall, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Sybella Stewart aproximadamente 1240, en Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1278, en Scotland, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Iona, Argyll, Scotland.
